articles.title: Safety Controls & Devices Share Price - Business Standard
articles.description: Safety Controls & Devices Share Price  Business Standard

articles.title: Quote of the day by Napoleon Hill: ‘When you begin to think and grow rich, you will…’
articles.description: Hill’s philosophy aligns closely with modern workplace trends. Today’s careers demand adaptability, skill-building, and clear direction rather than just long hours.

articles.title: CPI(M) workers held for arson attack on supporter’s house in Payyannur
articles.description: They had attacked the house of T. Purushothaman, who had supported independent candidate V. Kunhikrishnan

articles.title: Andhra Pradesh sets up 107 waste processing centres at ₹528 crore, targets June deadline
articles.description: A.P. Swachha Andhra Corporation says 107 fresh waste processing centres across Urban Local Bodies will be operational by mid-June with 5,385 tons daily capacity

topStories.title: Special session on sacrilege law an attempt by AAP Government to cover up its failures: Punjab Cong chief
topStories.description: The state Congress chief asked why the AAP had "failed" to punish those responsible for the sacrilege and the later killing of protesters. He was referring to the series of sacrilege incidents in 2015, the protests that followed, and the killing of two Sikhs in police firing at the protesters

topStories.title: ‘US failed to gain trust of Iranian delegation’, says Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf as he explains why talks failed
topStories.description: Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf on Sunday (local time) revealed why the talks between the US and Iran in Islamabad failed. The talks, which spanned over 21 hours, concluded with both sides blaming each other.

topStories.title: Kannur dental college student death raises questions about casteism in campuses
topStories.description: Parents alleged that certain faculty members discriminated against Nithin Raj on caste lines and showed a skin tone bias; CPI(M), Congress, and student organisations cutting across political lines have condemned the incident and demanded a comprehensive enquiry

topStories.title: Deported migrants arrive in Costa Rica from the US
topStories.description: Costa Rica has received 25 people deported by the US as the first wave of an agreement between the two countries.

topStories.title: BJP issues whip as Modi seeks support across party lines for women quota rollout
topStories.description: Congress chief Mallikarjun Kharge questioned the timing of the special sitting for the rollout and convening it without taking them into confidence

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 44 of the US-Iran conflict?
topStories.description: US-Iran talks in Islamabad end without a deal, with each side blaming the other for the failure.

topStories.title: US soccer captain's breakup with golfer gets messy after dating profile allegations
topStories.description: USMNT captain Christian Pulisic and girlfriend Alexa Melton appear to have split, with Melton suggesting he was on celebrity dating app Raya.

topStories.title: Toyota joins hydrogen truck alliance push
topStories.description: Toyota teams up with Daimler Truck and Volvo Group to scale hydrogen fuel-cell technology for heavy-duty trucks through the Cellcentric partnership.

topStories.title: Boatyard employee found 'exhausted' missing American's husband when he washed ashore after night adrift
topStories.description: The employee described Brian Hooker as exhausted when he landed on a rocky beach in Marsh Harbour, Bahamas, seeking help after he said his wife fell overboard from the couple's dinghy.

topStories.title: American Culture Quiz: Test yourself on presidential proposals and astronaut appetites
topStories.description: The American Culture Quiz is a weekly test of our national traits, trends, history and people. This time, test your knowledge of presidential proposals, astronaut appetites and more.

topStories.title: The quantum mystery that may explain how God knows every thought you have
topStories.description: Quantum entanglement, validated by physicists since 1935, offers a scientific perspective on how an omniscient God could know everything at once.

topStories.description: PM Mark Carney defends Canada's NATO commitment amid Trump criticism, despite Canada missing the 2% defense spending benchmark since the Berlin Wall fell.

dailyNews.title: Queen Camilla and Kate Middleton’s royal battle over blue sparked palace tension: expert
dailyNews.description: Behind palace walls, the color blue has reportedly sparked tension among royal women, with Queen Camilla allegedly getting first dibs on the shade.

dailyNews.title: The states revealed as best to start a family amid cratering belief in the American Dream
dailyNews.description: Red states outperform blue states in family stability, economic mobility, and education, according to a new 2026 Family Structure Index report.

dailyNews.title: Resurfaced clips from top Democrats echoing Trump on birthright citizenship spark online uproar: 'Wow'
dailyNews.description: Videos of Democrats Harry Reid and Dianne Feinstein criticizing birthright citizenship resurface as the Supreme Court debates Trump's executive order.

dailyNews.title: 'Christmas Vacation' and Congress: 'We're all in misery' amid the ongoing DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: Fox News' Chad Pergram discusses Congress' prolonged DHS shutdown and the risky tactics associated with it as political divisions threaten deeper government funding crises.

dailyNews.title: Eric Swalwell accused of paying nanny with campaign funds while she lacked work authorization
dailyNews.description: Two complaints allege Rep. Eric Swalwell violated immigration and employment laws to keep his nanny in the U.S. using campaign funds as payment.

dailyNews.title: Vance says US-Iran talks end without deal after 21 hours of negotiations
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance says U.S.-Iran talks ended without a deal after Iran refused American terms, calling the outcome bad news for Iran more than the United States.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo calls out 'delusion of omnipotence' fueling Iran war in vigil for peace at St. Peter's Basilica
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo decries the "delusion of omnipotence" he says is driving the war in Iran, urging peace during a Saturday vigil at St. Peter's Basilica.

dailyNews.title: Seven-foot statue unveiled honoring Magawa, award-winning rat who found more than 100 landmines in Cambodia
dailyNews.description: Magawa, the famous landmine-sniffing rat who won a gold medal for bravery in Cambodia, has been honored with a massive stone statue in Siem Reap.

dailyNews.title: Heather Graham says classmates dismissed her as 'nerdy' before Hollywood breakthrough proved them wrong
dailyNews.description: Heather Graham says she was dismissed as nerdy in high school before her cheerleader role in "License to Drive" launched her career and independence.

dailyNews.title: Trump greeted at UFC 327 in first sporting event appearance since start of Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump attended UFC 327 in Miami Saturday night, making his first appearance at a sporting event since the start of the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: 'The Boys' creator admits 'sinking feeling' as reality 'out-crazies' his political final season

topStories.description: The U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit said it did not have enough information to decide how much of the project can be suspended without jeopardizing the safety of the president.

topStories.description: Pope Leo XIV offered his strongest condemnation yet of the war in Iran on Saturday, appearing to take multiple veiled shots at President Trump.

dailyNews.description: The main attraction early at UFC 327 on Saturday night wasn’t any of the fighters, but President Donald Trump

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Trump says Iran doing 'very poor job' of allowing oil through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump accused Iran of violating its agreement with the U.S. over the Strait of Hormuz, saying on Thursday that it was "doing a poor job" of allowing oil to pass through the waterway.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Young men in U.S. to be automatically registered into military draft
dailyNews.description: The U.S. plans to roll out a system by December that automatically registers young men for the military draft, a policy signed into law by President Trump last year.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Melania Trump declares ‘I am not Epstein’s victim’
dailyNews.description: Melania Trump forcefully denied she had any relationship with Jeffrey Epstein, saying in a White House speech, she is speaking out to defend herself against people who are smearing her "good name."

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.
